messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration. We are currently 80% complete and remain on track for delivery this Friday.

Let me know if you need any additional details.

Best regards
arguments.subject: Project Update

content.delta: The email has been sent to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update". It summarises that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
